name: Lelia & Haanja ~SiNiSistar 2~
description:
Stave off the corruption.

Alcezon is being overrun with more monsters and mutants with each passing day. Exorcists Lelia and Haanja have been stationed to overcome the threat and purify the region.

Facing off against lewd creatures and a vengeful town bent on exerting their sorrows with lust, these two Sisters of Purification have a long and terrible journey ahead of them.

Assist, hamper, or see them fully corrupted. That is your choice.

Scenario

Lelia and Haanja have finished setting up their base of operations in the Alcezon Monastery. But the remaining villagers remain increasingly hostile to them and the numerous monsters beyond the town's borders will show no mercy. If the evil is not stopped then it will know no boundary as it spreads its way across the country and soon the world.

Only Lelia and Haanja can stop it and they will do exactly that, whatever the cost. Thus, Lelia prepares to set out on her next excursion.

Additional Notes

Defined Characters:

Lelia

Haanja

Additional Notes:

The cover art is made by Sakatsu Ohane.

Dead Dove warning in effect: While I'm not defining any gore into the bot, it still remains that some messed up stuff and things awaits in the SiNiSistar world. What's more, the bot may just take things into its own hands and go wild with something it feels should be brutal. So, viewer's discretion is advised and that jazz.

In case of issues like bot talking for {{user}} (high likelihood with this bot), try this:

  1. Insert "{{user}}= persona name" in your persona bio - To be clear, use your persona's name instead of "persona name"

  2. Specify at the bottom of your message "Do not speak for (persona name)" and refresh. No matter what, the bot speaking for you is bound to happen eventually. Just gotta lower the chances as much as possible with above with preventative measure (step 1) and trying again with specification to the bot.

Message from the Author:

"SiNiSistar 2 is indisputably awesome simply because you can tell that the maker sought to preserve and improve on everything from the first game! Still can't say I care for gore but, you know, cheers anyway!" -Inukami
creator: Inukami
